docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1997, CONTINUED TO DEC-19-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUICH, VLAHO IVAN WONG, MICHELLE LYNN DOES 1 TO 30 ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: STATUTORY COSTS TO DEFENDANT[S] PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DENIED, NONSUIT.

NO APPEARANCE AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL OR FURTHER SANCTIONS., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-1996 CONTINUED FROM NOV-06-1996 TO DEC-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
